projects.name: MTN Benin & MTN Congo corporate websites
projects.desc: Corporate showcase websites for two major telecom operators: custom themes, tailored plugins, multilingual content management and performance/SEO optimization.

projects.name: MyMTN Selfcare & MonRouteur
projects.desc: Subscriber Selfcare app (SPA) — plans, purchases and account management — and the MonRouteur page for activating plans/data when the balance or bundle is depleted. RESTful API integration, advanced state management and UX optimization.

projects.name: Emilia Cross — Live-video dating app
projects.desc: A Flutter mobile app + PWA where connections are made over per-minute billed live video: video streaming, KYC (Stripe Identity), Stripe payments & payouts, partner discovery and real-time messaging. Flutter clients + multi-service NestJS backend (API + dedicated WebSocket server) with RBAC, 2FA and monitoring.

projects.name: PaulBot — AI portfolio assistant
projects.desc: A conversational assistant embedded in my portfolio that answers visitors' questions about my background. Dedicated NestJS backend streaming tokens (SSE) from an OpenAI-compatible LLM (Groq — Llama 3.3 70B), hot-swappable to a self-hosted Ollama with no code change. Context-stuffing strategy (the full profile fits the model's context window, so no RAG needed yet) on a RAG-ready architecture. Prompt-level guardrails keep it on-topic and NDA-safe, a marker system lets it navigate the site, and in-memory sessions auto-generate a PDF transcript emailed at the end of each conversation.

projects.name: Luap Dever — Interactive portfolio “PaulBrain OS”
projects.desc: Next-generation portfolio with three experiences to choose from: an awwwards-style animated landing (GSAP/ScrollTrigger — preloader, pinned horizontal scroll, kinetic typography, marquees), an in-browser operating system (“PaulBrain OS” — window manager, taskbar, app launcher, Web-Audio-synthesized UI sounds) and an interactive terminal mode. Ships PaulBot, an AI assistant wired to a streaming LLM (SSE), with voice dictation and text-to-speech (Web Speech), an open-source anti-spam captcha (ALTCHA) and PDF conversation export by email. Bilingual (FR/EN), accessible (ARIA, prefers-reduced-motion), responsive and SEO-optimized.
